mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_stories ( user_id, title, summary, content, voice_config, category, tags, status, likes_count, plays_count, user_nickname, user_avatar, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{voiceConfig}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{likesCount}, #{playsCount}, #{userNickname}, #{userAvatar}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, summary, content, voice_config as voiceConfig, category, tags, status, likes_count as likesCount, plays_count as playsCount, user_nickname as userNickname, user_avatar as userAvatar, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM community_stories WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, title, summary, category, tags, likes_count as likesCount, plays_count as playsCount, user_nickname as userNickname, user_avatar as userAvatar, created_at as createdAt FROM community_stories WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_stories SET likes_count = likes_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND likes_count > 0

UPDATE community_stories SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, voice_config = #{voiceConfig}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND story_id = #{storyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO story_likes (user_id, story_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{storyId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM story_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND story_id = #{storyId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_stories WHERE status = 1
AND category = #{category}
